name: Flyaway Sim Golf
about: Flyaway Sim Golf is an indoor golf simulator venue in Henderson, featuring 24/7 access for members and public bookings available from 8 a.m. to 8 p.m. The facility is equipped with Trackman-powered bays, providing real-time swing analytics, virtual rounds on 400+ courses, and pro-level performance insights. Players must bring their own clubs, while tees, balls, and water are provided. A curated selection of snacks and drinks are available for purchase. Memberships start at $179 per month, with hourly rates at $50.
why_golfers_like_it: 24/7 access for members with flexible booking options
Powered by Trackman technology for real-time swing analytics
400+ virtual courses available for play and practice

food_and_drink.notes: Curated range of snacks available for purchase

simulator_hardware.notes: Fully integrated Trackman 360º ecosystem with real-time data and immersive virtual courses

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: Yes, you must bring your own clubs to use at the facility.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: No outside food or drinks are allowed, but a curated selection of snacks and drinks are available for purchase on-site.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: The time to play 18 holes is not specified, but virtual rounds are available on 400+ courses.

faq.question: Is the venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: There is no specific mention of kid-friendly amenities or policies.
